name: Gazpacho Verde
recipeIngredient: 2 large bunches fresh spinach (8 oz), rinsed and drained
3 scallions, white and green parts, roughly chopped
1/4 cup fresh dill leaves, loosely packed
8 fresh nasturium leaves (or 2 tbsp fresh garden cress leaves, minced)
1 to 2 garlic cloves, minced or pressed
1/2 teaspoon salt, freshly ground black pepper
1 scallion, white and green parts, finely chopped
1/2 cucumber, seeded if mature, finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil.
2. Add the spinach, arugula, and 3 scallions. Cook until the spinach just begins to wilt, not more than 1 minute or so.
3. Drain.
4. In a food processor or blender, puree until smooth the remaining ingredients: greens, cucumber, olive oil, garlic, lime juice, vegetable stock, salt, pepper, chopped scallion, and diced cucumber.
5. Chill and serve with one of the recommended garnishes. Serves 4 to 6. Enjoy!
